description: Alice acts as sole organizer, scheduling three separate events for different people across the week.

events.title: Infrastructure Handoff
events.reasoning: Alice schedules an infrastructure handoff between Bob and Frank on Tuesday at 2 PM. Bob confirms and will loop in Frank.

events.title: Compliance Training
events.reasoning: Alice asks Carol to run compliance training for new hires on Wednesday at 9 AM for 2 hours. Carol confirms.

events.title: Board Slide Review
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a board slide review with Dave on Thursday at noon for 1 hour in the boardroom. Dave confirms.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 3 events organized by Alice for different people across the week.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24, Wednesday=Feb 25, Thursday=Feb 26. Frank is mentioned but not a speaker in the conversation.
